diagrams.title: Typedef Syntax Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the general syntax pattern for typedef declarations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the basic typedef declaration format

diagrams.title: Typedef with Structures Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how typedef simplifies structure declarations
elements: Without typedef: struct Student { }; struct Student s1;
With typedef: typedef struct { } Student; Student s1;
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the benefit of typedef with structures

diagrams.title: Type Alias vs New Type
diagrams.description: Demonstrates that typedef creates aliases, not new types
